title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Resolve critical customer-reported issues and bugs to maintain high system availability within Teleste's Public Safety and Mobility solutions.
Design and implement new features to enhance platform capabilities, collaborating with clients on evolving requirements.

title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed 8+ Spring Boot microservices for real-time network monitoring and fault management, reducing response time by ~30%.
Wrote 150+ unit and integration tests with JUnit and Mockito, increasing test coverage from 65% to 92% and catching 25+ critical bugs pre-production.

title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built scalable, non-blocking microservices with Spring WebFlux and Reactor, improving responsiveness and reducing latency under peak loads; improved startup performance by ~25%.
Led API validation using Karate for robust end-to-end test coverage.

title: Java Developer

Collaborated with onshore teams and clients to troubleshoot defects and deliver critical updates.

title: Junior Software Engineer
